header: Ten element groups. Every page you'll ever need.
subheadline: Swipe through a sample of the groups all 255 Desiderio elements are organized into — whatever the brief asks for, there's a group for it.

items.title: Data & Dashboards
items.description: Stat rows, KPI tiles, and chart elements that make your numbers look as good as they are.

items.title: People & Team
items.description: Team grids, advisor lists, and author bylines with avatar handling already done.

items.title: Trust & Social Proof
items.description: Logo walls, testimonials, and case studies — credibility, ready to publish.

items.title: Leads & Conversion
items.description: CTA banners, signup blocks, and 8 bundled forms that turn visitors into pipeline.

items.title: Navigation & Footers
items.description: Menus, breadcrumbs, and footer variants that finish every page frame properly.
